description_long: An adult male pedestrian is depicted standing with his hands in the pockets of a loose-fitting, bomber-style jacket. He is dressed in casual, athletic-inspired attire, featuring track pants with side stripes and a pair of sneakers. His facial features are visible, and he has closely cropped hair. The overall build is average, and the posture is relaxed, with weight distributed evenly on both legs. The clothing appears to be made of synthetic or cotton-blend fabrics, typical for urban streetwear. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure is suitable for placement in a variety of urban environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male stands with hands in jacket pockets, wearing track pants and sneakers, with a relaxed posture and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, hands in jacket pockets, and full visibility of the jacket and track pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the jacket's sleeve, and the side stripes on the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, the back of the head, and the full length of the pants' stripes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, jacket, and the right leg's pant stripe.
attribute_clothing_type: casual bomber jacket and athletic track pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands in pockets
